name: Meta: AAA + Momentum 30vol
description: Equal-weight blend of the highest-performing 30vol momentum and adaptive allocation strategies: AAA Top-3 30vol (Sharpe 8.8), AAA Full Universe 30vol (Sharpe 6.0), Momentum Top-3 30vol (Sharpe 6.4), and Momentum 6-Month 30vol (Sharpe 5.3). Concentrates in the most return-efficient 30vol momentum approaches.
